group.name: news test
group.description: Authoritative five-agent news workflow binding test group

channel.name: News Test Five-Agent Protocol
channel.summary: Executable five-role news workflow baseline is active and waiting for cycle 1 start.

sections.objective: Establish the authoritative five-agent role binding for the news test group without executing bootstrap or formal workflow cycles.

formal_workflow.title: Formal Workflow
formal_workflow.summary: Executable baseline installed. No cycle has started; manager must open cycle 1 explicitly.

worker-33.responsibility: news material collection for the 33 lane

worker-xhs.responsibility: news material collection for the xhs lane

formal_workflow.summary: Executable five-role baseline installed. Waiting for manager cycle_start for cycle 1.

cycle_baseline_ready.semantic_description: Executable baseline is installed. Manager opens each cycle explicitly with cycle identity before collection begins.

material_collect.semantic_description: Worker-33 and worker-xhs submit cycle-scoped material evidence; manager closes collection explicitly.

editorial_review.semantic_description: Editor compiles the cycle draft and manager explicitly accepts or requests correction.

qa_validation.semantic_description: Tester validates the cycle draft and manager explicitly closes validation.

final_delivery.semantic_description: Manager delivers the final cycle output and returns the workflow to baseline for the next cycle.

group_identity.group_objective: Run cycle-based five-role news workflow with explicit cycle identity and authoritative role binding.
